title: Crowd Surge — Mass Flight Cancellation
description: A major airline has cancelled 12 flights simultaneously due to a system outage. Thousands of passengers are converging on the check-in area creating dangerous crowd density.

event.details: Crowd density exceeding 5 persons/sqm at T1 check-in — mass cancellation aftermath
Video analytics detecting crowd surge pattern — reverse flow at main entrance
Shouting detected in crowd — passengers frustrated and becoming agitated

optimal_response.primary_action: deploy all available officers to T1 check-in and open additional processing lanes
optimal_response.secondary_action: use PA to redirect passengers and contact CAG operations for additional support
optimal_response.do_not: Do not use force to disperse crowd. Do not create bottlenecks by closing exits.
optimal_response.escalation: If crowd causes falls or injuries, escalate to Level 4 and activate Medical Emergency SOP
